requirement: Close defer or formally accept every applicable RTM requirement
evidence_required: Approved RTM with no undispositioned release-critical gaps

requirement: Authenticate and authorize HTTP OTA/config/weather endpoints
Provision production Secure Boot and flash encryption
evidence_required: Approved manufacturing instruction and eFuse readback
Signed FAT record with equipment serials

requirement: Pass SAT at installed irrigation site
evidence_required: Signed SAT record or approved site deviations

requirement: Prove bootability across interrupted OTA and power cycles
evidence_required: Serial logs and version evidence for each interruption point

requirement: Calibrate installed flow and pressure sensors per zone
Inject leak pipe-break restriction and valve-response faults
evidence_required: Observed shutdown alarm and recovery records

requirement: Verify routed authenticated MQTT broker ACLs

disposition: Step 10 follow-up; not a field-safety substitute

requirement: Complete controlled endurance and network-loss soak
evidence_required: Duration reset heap event-drop and reconnect report
